title: calamintha masukensis
intro: Calamintha masukensis, also known as mountain calamintha, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is native to the Himalayas and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections, offering health benefits such as relief from nausea and improved breathing. Herbal preparations of Calamintha masukensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of forms.
